title: IIT Dharwad Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Indian Institute of Technology Dharwad (IIT Dharwad)
short_info: Indian Institute of Technology Dharwad (IIT Dharwad) has published the Library Trainee Notification 2026 on 07 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 2 Library Trainee positions. Candidates within the age range of up to 26 years and holding a Master’s in Library & Information Science (MLISc) with a minimum of 65% or equivalent academic record are eligible to apply online at the official website. The application process will be active from 07 May 2026 to 31 May 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's in Library & Information Science (MLISc) with a minimum 65% or equivalent academic record.
qualification.details: Master's in Library & Information Science (MLISc) with a minimum 65% or equivalent academic record.

selection_process: Application Scrutiny/Shortlisting based on academic record Written Test Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Dharwad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Dharwad Library Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IIT Dharwad Library Trainee positions is 31st May 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Library Trainee post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Library & Information Science (MLISc) with a minimum academic record of 65% or an equivalent grade to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Library Trainee position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Library Trainee position at the Indian Institute of Technology Dharwad as per the latest recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Library Trainee post is 26 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Library Trainee role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Library Trainee position will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 25,000. This is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the IIT Dharwad Library Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial scrutiny and shortlisting of applications based on academic records, followed by a written test and a personal interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the IIT Dharwad Library Trainee positions?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) applying for the Library Trainee positions at IIT Dharwad.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the IIT Dharwad Library Trainee recruitment must be submitted through the online mode only. Offline applications will not be considered.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Library Trainee position?
faq.answer: The Library Trainee position at IIT Dharwad is a contractual role. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure as per the institute's policy.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
